mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_msds WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_msds WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_msds WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_msds ( msds_type, item_name, item_code, cas_number, supplier, version, issue_date, retire_date, retire_reason, language, file_size, file_id, export_countries, is_latest, change_type, change_summary, registered_by, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{msdsType}, #{itemName}, #{itemCode}, #{casNumber}, #{supplier}, #{version}, #{issueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{retireDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{retireReason}, #{language}, #{fileSize}, #{fileId}, #{exportCountries}, #{isLatest}, #{changeType}, #{changeSummary}, #{registeredBy}, #{status}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_msds SET msds_type = #{msdsType}, item_name = #{itemName}, item_code = #{itemCode}, cas_number = #{casNumber}, supplier = #{supplier}, version = #{version}, issue_date = #{issueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, retire_date = #{retireDate,jdbcType=DATE}, retire_reason = #{retireReason}, language = #{language}, file_size = #{fileSize}, file_id = #{fileId}, export_countries = #{exportCountries}, is_latest = #{isLatest}, change_type = #{changeType}, change_summary = #{changeSummary}, registered_by = #{registeredBy}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_msds SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
